title: calystegia fulcrata subsp. pedicellata
intro: Calystegia fulcrata subsp. pedicellata, also known as the coastal morning glory, is a flowering plant species within the Convolvulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calystegia fulcrata subsp. pedicellata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of forms.
